description: Create the processing and infrastructure modules: quality.py, motion.py, color.py, audio.py, export.py. These handle quality gating, optical flow, color grading, audio sync, and timeline/drive export.
steps: Create ltx_pro/quality.py: Extract compute_frame_ssim() (line 3238), compute_histogram_consistency() (line 3275), compute_artifact_score() (line 3306), compute_segment_quality() (line 3340), quality_gate_check() (line 3379), detect_shot_type() (line 3411), get_resolution_for_shot() (line 3443). Include __all__ export list.

Create ltx_pro/motion.py: Extract estimate_optical_flow() (line 3082), detect_motion_direction() (line 3109), auto_select_camera_lora() (line 3147), compute_velocity_latent() (line 3171), compute_adaptive_overlap() (line 3194). Include __all__ export list.
Create ltx_pro/color.py: Extract extract_color_histogram() (line 3547), match_color_histogram() (line 3578), apply_color_grade() (line 3664). Include __all__ export list.

Create ltx_pro/audio.py: Extract AudioSyncEngine class (lines 1829-2105), detect_beats() (line 3897), compute_segment_boundaries() (line 3947), adjust_segment_length() (line 3985). Also extract the VOICE_SYNC configuration constants. Include __all__ export list.

Create ltx_pro/export.py: Extract generate_timeline_json() (line 3712), generate_edl() (line 3763), mount_google_drive() (line 3827), sync_to_drive() (line 3844), check_drive_cache() (line 3868), generate_thumbnail_frame() (line 4023), display_thumbnail_grid() (line 4082), concatenate_clips() (line 7552), merge_clips_to_video() (line 8199), auto_find_output_clips() (line 8372). Include __all__ export list.
Ensure all modules pass python3 -m py_compile. Guard heavy imports.
Run verification: find ltx_pro -name '*.py' -exec python3 -m py_compile {} \;
acceptance_criteria: ltx_pro/quality.py contains SSIM, histogram, artifact scoring and quality gate functions with __all__
ltx_pro/motion.py contains optical flow, motion direction, velocity and adaptive overlap functions with __all__
ltx_pro/color.py contains histogram extraction, matching, and color grading with __all__
ltx_pro/audio.py contains AudioSyncEngine class and beat detection functions with __all__
ltx_pro/export.py contains timeline/EDL generation, Google Drive, thumbnails, and clip merging with __all__
All five files pass python3 -m py_compile
All public classes and functions have docstrings
